svg.title: ER Diagram — Adaptive Learning Platform
svg.desc: Entity relationship diagram showing all 11 tables and their relationships
svg.text: COURSES / MODULES / LESSONS — content delivery hierarchy
ENROLLMENTS / QUESTIONS / LESSON_PROGRESS / QUIZ_ATTEMPTS — activity tracking
LEARNER_PROFILES — adaptive engine (skill level, XP, streak, weak/strong topics)
🔑 PK = Primary Key 🔗 FK = Foreign Key 11 tables total
